response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and entrepreneurial activity through GISCollective, but the role requires 15 years of experience and director-level individual contributor depth with recognized AI expertise. Tenure is approximately 14-15 years with most roles at senior/staff IC level rather than principal/director scope, and AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work without demonstrated AI products, platforms, or strategic advisory experience at scale.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
Strong engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, public talks)
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise — only recent MCP/agent tooling, no shipped AI products or platforms
No evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic advisory work, or influencing cross-org technical direction
Cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK at one role); no deep cloud platform architecture track record

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth for AI-strategy principal role
Lacks director-level IC scope and strategic advisory experience
Broad engineering breadth and entrepreneurial founder experience
